name: Strike V
comment: Our newest STRIKE design introduces dynamic dual-layer pixel effects with a punchy flair that brings totally new and unique looks to our tour-proven STRIKE family of IP65-rated strobes and blinders. STRIKE V features dual LED diodes, under a variable electronic frost plate that can change beam angles instantly at the press of a button, and together offer fresh new multicolor creative possibilities. Advanced eye-candy effects, vibrant color washes, and stunning strobe capabilities from a motorized 180° tilting strobe/wash hybrid designed for powerful performance in the most demanding applications and conditions.
